title: crataegus scabrifolia
intro: Crataegus scabrifolia, also known as the rough-leaved hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus scabrifolia include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. Crataegus scabrifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
